message:
feat(extension_replay): add ReplayRecorder and lane abstractions for dispatch forensics

Build the integration layer for deterministic record-replay: ReplayRecorder
accumulates dispatch events (scheduled/queue_accepted/policy_decision/cancelled/
retried/completed/failed) with logical clock progression, canonicalizes ordering,
applies capture budget gates, and produces diagnostic snapshots with root-cause
hints. Adds finish_and_compare() for divergence detection against reference
bundles and standalone compare_replay_bundles() for offline forensic analysis.
18 new tests (41→59 total). Closes bd-3ar8v.4.40.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
